abf_relevance.notes: World's single largest CoWoS/ABF substrate consumer. GPU shipments directly determine ABF demand.

data_completeness.notes: All major fields present. Financial data approximate but structurally complete.

source_quality.notes: 4 official NVIDIA URLs successfully accessed. T2 rating - official sources but financials not directly cited.

reviewer_notes: NVIDIA is the most critical company for ABF intelligence. High score reflects dominant market position and comprehensive data. Financial approximations acceptable given public knowledge of this mega-cap company.
